body_excerpt: In multiple functions of libl3oemcrypto.cpp, there is a possible weakness in the existing obfuscation mechanism due to the way sensitive data is handled. This could lead to local information disclosure with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足
